title: Manufacturing Engineer - Himalaya Drug Company - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Himalaya Drug Company - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
